# Allow-list of accepted security advisories for SHIPPED (production) dependencies.
#
# This is the single source of truth used by scripts/check-vulnerabilities.mjs and
# the CI "Security & SBOM" job. One GHSA id per line; `#` starts a comment.
#
# Only add an advisory here when there is no fix available AND the risk has been
# assessed as acceptable. Document the rationale for each entry in SECURITY.md.
#
# Note: dev / build-tooling advisories (Angular CLI dev-server, webpack, karma,
# esbuild, …) are NOT audited by the gate — they never reach consumers — so they
# must NOT be listed here.
#
# (currently empty: `npm audit --omit=dev` reports 0 vulnerabilities)
